title: Auto Rejoin
description: A client side Minecraft mod that automatically rejoins a server if you’re kicked, the server restarts, or enters maintenance mode.
body:
# Auto Rejoin

**A client side Minecraft mod that automatically rejoins a server if you’re kicked, the server restarts, or enters maintenance mode.**

## Dependencies

- [Fabric Api](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api/version/0.141.3+1.21.11)
- [Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config/version/21.11.153+fabric)
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu/version/17.0.0-beta.2)

## Got a issue?

Report it on my [Discord](https://discord.gg/eHqUgwqHqC)
